sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented for SNES port

special_mechanics.name: Two-Lane Battle System
special_mechanics.description: Players can change between background and foreground rows at any time (except in single-player mode where CPU must change first). Novel positioning mechanic affecting spatial movement.

special_mechanics.name: Special Moves
special_mechanics.description: Characters have special techniques performed via joystick and button combinations. Timing and input precision are emphasized gameplay elements.

tier_notes: T2 tier: Fighting game with gameplay documentation but no detailed physics parameters in available sources. SNES port (1993) - specific movement values not documented in Wikipedia source.
